sections.paragraph:
ἐπιφωνέω impf. ἐπεφώνουν; aor. ἐπεφώνησα LXX (s. φωνέω; Soph. et al.; ins, pap, LXX, TestJob 43:3; EpArist, Philo) cry out (loudly) τινί against someone (cp. Plut., Alex. 665 [3, 6]) Ac 22:24. ἄλλο τι someth. different 21:34 (s. ἄλλος 1c end). W. direct discourse foll. (OGI 595, 35; PRyl 77, 33; 1 Esdr 9:47) Lk 23:21; Ac 12:22.—DELG s.v. φωνή. M-M.

impf. impf. = imperfect

aor. aor. = aorist

LXX LXX = Septuaginta, ed. ARahlfs, unless otherwise specified—Lists 2, beg.

Soph Soph , V b.c.—List 5

et al. et al. = et alii (and others)

ins Ins, ins = Inscription, Inschrift, inscription(s). Without a period, esp. in lists, as at the beginning of entries; the capitalized form is used in titles. In conjunction with literary works this abbr. refers to the title or description of contents.

pap pap = papyrus, -yri

TestJob TestJob = Testament of Job—List 2

EpArist EpArist = Epistle of Aristeas, II b.c.—List 5

Philo Philo = P. of Alexandria, I b.c.–I a.d.—List 5

  1. cp. = compare, freq. in ref. to citation fr. ancient texts

Plut Plut , I–II a.d.—List 5

someth. someth. = something

foll. foll. = followed, following

OGI OGI = Orientis Graeci Inscriptiones Selectae—List 3

PRyl PRyl = Catalogue of the Greek Papyri in the John Rylands Library—List 4

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

M-M M-M = JMoulton/GMilligan, Vocabulary of Greek Testament—Lists 4, 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 386
